queries.name: implementation-plan
queries.query: What should change before implementing the graph retry path?

records.summary: Keep CLI product auth outside the reusable context engine.
records.rationale: CLI credential files, OAuth browser callbacks, and local secret storage are product runtime concerns.

records.summary: Retry repository ingestion after transient timeout.

episodes.name: repo-timeout-fix
episodes.body: Repository ingestion timed out once and succeeded after a bounded retry.
